Public fixture sources used in this corpus:

- `pbap_public_pb.vcf`
- `map_public_mlisting.xml`
- `map_public_0123.bmsg`
- `map_public_456789.bmsg`

These files are adapted from the public `nccgroup/nOBEX` example tree:

- https://github.com/nccgroup/nOBEX/tree/master/examples/pbap_root
- https://github.com/nccgroup/nOBEX/tree/master/examples/map_root

They improve parser coverage with real profile-shaped payloads, but they are not
claimed to be malformed live captures from this project’s own hardware runs.
